mapper.select: SELECT l.lecture_id, l.lecture_name, pc.name AS pro_name, l.year, l.semester, sc.start_date AS start_date, sc.end_date AS end_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c2 WHERE c2.lecture_id = l.lecture_id) AS total_count, (le.created_at IS NOT NULL) AS is_evaluated, (g.mid_score > 0 AND g.fin_score > 0 AND g.assignment_score > 0) AS has_grade FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN schedule_cache sc ON sc.schedule_id = ( SELECT schedule_id FROM schedule_cache WHERE type = 'LECTURE_EVALUATION' AND year = l.year AND semester = l.semester ORDER BY schedule_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN lecture_evaluation le ON le.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.student_code = #{memberCode} AND l.year = #{year} AND l.semester = #{semester}

SELECT l.lecture_id, l.lecture_name, pc.name AS pro_name, l.year, l.semester, sc.start_date AS start_date, sc.end_date AS end_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c WHERE c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id) AS total_count FROM lecture l JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN schedule_cache sc ON sc.schedule_id = ( SELECT schedule_id FROM schedule_cache WHERE type = 'LECTURE_EVALUATION' AND year = l.year AND semester = l.semester ORDER BY schedule_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE l.member_code = #{memberCode} AND l.end_date < NOW() AND l.year = #{year} AND l.semester = #{semester}

SELECT l.lecture_id, l.lecture_name, pc.name AS pro_name, sc.start_date AS start_date, sc.end_date AS end_date, COUNT(le.evaluation_id) AS response_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c2 WHERE c2.lecture_id = l.lecture_id) AS total_students, AVG(le.score) AS score, COUNT(le.comment) AS total_comments FROM lecture l JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code <<<<<<< Updated upstream LEFT JOIN schedule_cache sc ON sc.type = 'LECTURE_EVALUATION' AND sc.year = l.year AND sc.semester = l.semester ======= LEFT JOIN schedule_cache sc ON sc.schedule_id = ( SELECT schedule_id FROM schedule_cache WHERE type = 'LECTURE_EVALUATION' AND year = l.year AND semester = l.semester ORDER BY schedule_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) >>>>>>> Stashed changes LEFT JOIN course c ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_evaluation le ON le.course_id = c.course_id AND le.created_at IS NOT NULL WHERE l.lecture_id = #{lectureId} GROUP BY l.lecture_id, l.lecture_name, pc.name, sc.start_date, sc.end_date
SELECT le.comment FROM lecture_evaluation le JOIN course c ON le.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.lecture_id = #{lecture_id} AND le.comment IS NOT NULL AND le.created_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT l.lecture_id, l.lecture_name, pc.name AS pro_name, sc.start_date AS start_date, sc.end_date AS end_date, le.score, le.comment FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id JOIN professor_cache pc ON l.member_code = pc.member_code LEFT JOIN schedule_cache sc ON sc.schedule_id = ( SELECT schedule_id FROM schedule_cache WHERE type = 'LECTURE_EVALUATION' AND year = l.year AND semester = l.semester ORDER BY schedule_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN lecture_evaluation le ON le.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.student_code = #{memberCode} AND l.lecture_id = #{lectureId}
